evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Critical Inclusion Criteria:~1. Participants with proven diagnosis of adenocarcinoma of the breast with evidence of either locally advanced disease not amenable to resection or radiation therapy with curative intent or metastatic disease not amenable to curative therapy.~2. Participants must be appropriate candidates for endocrine monotherapy~3. Participants must have measurable disease or bone only disease with evaluable lesions~4.
